content: Anyone have a clean transition for a jazz-to-contemporary switch mid-piece? Looking for something under eight counts that doesn't kill the floor pattern.
For those of you who've expanded — how much runway did you carry into the lease signing? Trying to sanity-check my own margin before I talk to the accountant.
Halloween show is next Saturday. Wish us luck.
Has anyone in PA had luck with women-in-business micro-grants lately? The application windows all seem to close in Q4 and I keep missing them.
Looking for a wholesale source on plain black leotards for a Halloween ensemble. Need about 20 in mixed child sizes by Oct 24.
Anyone at Laurel Creek willing to swap a Sunday day for a Tuesday night in early November? I have a wedding weekend I need to protect.
Feature request: let me pin a running-list of open questions somewhere the assistant will surface on my next check-in. My brain forgets what I was holding.
Fall CEU sequence sorted. If anyone wants my running list of Category-A approved webinars, DM me.
